searchQueries.title: Search queries
searchQueries.description: Job search terms. Each term generates a separate search. Examples: 'Software Engineer', 'Product Manager', 'Data Scientist'.

location.title: Location
location.description: Job location filter. Use country, city or region. Examples: 'United States', 'Brazil', 'London', 'Remote'.

remote.title: Remote only
remote.description: When enabled, filters results to remote jobs only.

easyApplyOnly.title: Easy Apply only
easyApplyOnly.description: When enabled, verifies each job page and returns only jobs with the Easy Apply button (apply directly on LinkedIn without leaving the site). When disabled, returns all jobs without verification.

seniorityLevel.title: Seniority level
seniorityLevel.description: Filter by seniority level. Leave empty to include all levels.

datePosted.title: Date posted
datePosted.description: Filter jobs by how recently they were posted.

maxResultsPerQuery.title: Max results per query
maxResultsPerQuery.description: Maximum number of jobs to collect per search query. Higher values increase run time and cost.
